case_title: JEFFERSON UNION HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT et al VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON UNION HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT REPRESENTED BY ALFRED J.PUCCI/ASSOCIATE SUPERINTEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS PUBLIC UTLITIES COMMISSION/CLAIMS DEPT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,184.76 FILED BY JEFFERSON UNION HIGH SCHOOL DISTRICT REPRESENTED BY ALFRED J.PUCCI/ASSOCIATE SUPERINTEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS PUBLIC UTLITIES COMMISSION/CLAIMS DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
